main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'incomplete ripening greensand → inadequate Fe/Mn removal + fouling RO' — captura una de 3.

recommended_action.justification: Full ripening + backwash + rinse — sólo operacional para greensand, sin CIP membrana.

requested_data.justification: Pide Fe/Mn en feedwater post-greensand día -35 — histórico, match parcial.

decision_change_condition.justification: Single: Fe/Mn alto post-greensand → switch a KMnO4 dosing.
